section_miscategorizations.text: He has one plus non-pitting edema bilaterally in his lower extremities.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an objective physical exam finding rather than a patient-reported symptom or history detail, and it is already documented appropriately in the Findings section.

section_miscategorizations.text: The nurse will be in soon to check him out.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a workflow/logistical statement about the current visit rather than a forward-looking medical plan (orders, follow-up, or treatment instructions).
